items.name: IAEA Topical Issues in Nuclear Installation Safety (TIC2026)
items.relevance: Nuclear installation safety best practices. Relevant to LFR design safety case and licensing.

items.name: Nuclear Power Plants Expo and Summit
items.relevance: Regional event. Turkey exploring nuclear expansion.

items.name: GIFEN & NIA French Workshop in London
items.relevance: Targeted France–UK nuclear supply-chain networking — directly supports newcleo's French industrial base and UK market-entry story. Imminent and places limited; register now.

items.name: USTDA Civil Nuclear Energy Workshop: Partnering for Implementation
items.relevance: US government–industry workshop convening US and European/Eurasian nuclear leaders on civil nuclear deployment and supply chains. London-based — strong access to US agencies (DOE/Commerce/State), transatlantic partners and the US export/finance apparatus relevant to newcleo's US strategy.

items.name: USNIC Distinguished Leadership Awards Dinner
items.relevance: High-level networking with US nuclear industry leaders.

items.name: 41st Annual Decommissioning & Radioactive Waste Management Summer School
items.organizer: Informa Connect (in association with the UK nuclear decommissioning/waste sector, incl. NIA-promoted)
items.participation: Attend/network; potential faculty or case-study speaking slot on advanced fuel cycle/spent fuel topics
items.speaker: Faculty include UK NNL, ISIN (Italy), Nuclear Institute leadership; internationally-focused programme
items.relevance: Directly touches spent-fuel management, waste characterisation and international decommissioning case studies (Germany, Finland, France), core to newcleo's closed fuel cycle positioning

items.name: INMM 67th Annual Meeting
items.relevance: Nuclear materials management and safeguards. Relevant to MOX/Euratom safeguards-by-design.

items.name: U.S. Women in Nuclear Conference
items.relevance: D&I engagement.

items.name: NAC Nuclear Fuel Manufacturing Oversight (NFMO)
items.relevance: Fuel design, manufacturing, and performance oversight. Relevant to MOX fuel fabrication quality.

items.name: NAC Spent Fuel Academy Training
items.relevance: Dry storage and transportation of spent nuclear fuel. Relevant to back-end fuel cycle.

items.name: Global 2026: Deploying Sustainable Nuclear Fuel Cycles
items.relevance: Directly aligned with newcleo's MOX recycling and sustainable fuel cycle mission. Must-attend.

items.name: Canaccord Genuity 46th Annual Growth Conference
items.speaker: Stefano Buono, Jon Stranske
items.relevance: Flagship Canaccord growth conference. Key for newcleo investor relations and SPAC positioning with CG as advisor.

items.name: IAEA Workshop on Manufacturing HALEU Advanced Fuels
items.organizer: IAEA (Div. of Nuclear Fuel Cycle & Waste Technology)
items.relevance: Operational aspects of advanced-fuel fabrication, qualification, licensing, transport and supply chain — covers fast reactors. Useful fuel-cycle and competitive intelligence on the HALEU route (vs newcleo's MOX). Formal/abstract deadlines passed; explore late observer or virtual access.

items.name: Nuclear Energy Conference & Expo (NECX 2026)
items.relevance: Largest combined US nuclear industry conference. Exhibition, regulatory, advanced nuclear tracks.

items.name: La REF — Rencontre des Entrepreneurs de France
items.speaker: Elisabeth Rizzotti
items.relevance: Major French business leaders forum (MEDEF). Visibility with French industrial and investor ecosystem.

items.name: Roadmaps to New Nuclear 2026
items.relevance: High-level ministerial conference: ministers, CEOs, financiers. Focus on international cooperation on supply chains, fuel, workforce, financing, regulation, and deploying advanced reactors/SMRs. 4th edition, co-hosted by US DOE — strong France-based access to governments and multilateral financiers. Exact dates not yet published.

items.name: Atlantic Council Nuclear Energy Policy Summit 2026
items.relevance: Annual nuclear-policy summit during Climate Week NYC (20-27 Sep). The 2025 edition featured a supply-chain "Strategic Dialogue" with Stefano Buono on the panel (moderated by WNA DG Sama Bilbao y León). High-value US policy/finance and Net Zero Nuclear visibility. Exact 2026 date TBC.

items.name: World Nuclear Symposium 2026
items.relevance: Premier global nuclear industry summit. Entire value chain. Critical for investor relations and partnerships.

items.name: NENE 2026 — Nuclear Energy for New Europe
items.relevance: Regional CEE nuclear conference. Useful for Central European visibility and engagement adjacent to the Slovak/Bohunice ecosystem.

items.name: 70th IAEA General Conference
items.relevance: Milestone 70th anniversary. Nuclear policy decision-making at highest government level.

items.name: NEA Workshop on Lessons Learnt from New Nuclear Construction
items.relevance: Regulators sharing cross-cutting construction lessons. More construction-oversight than newcleo's near-term narrative — monitor only. Hybrid; in-person registration closes 28 Aug.

items.name: New Build & Existing Generation (NIA Business Group)
items.relevance: UK developers and suppliers with explicit exhibition space — useful for GDA visibility, industrial partnerships and UK supply-chain mapping. Ten stands first-come, first-served.

items.name: Nu-Tech Engineering & Technology Solutions Exhibition (Birchwood Nuclear Exhibition) — Autumn 2026
items.organizer: Nu-Tech Exhibitions & Events, supported by the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA) and Nuclear Industry Association (NIA)
items.participation: Exhibit/attend for UK supply-chain networking; free to visit
items.speaker: NDA opening address; no newcleo-specific slot identified
items.relevance: Regional UK nuclear supply-chain networking event, useful for newcleo's UK operations and supply-chain engagement, though narrower in strategic scope

items.name: UK Nuclear Safety & Risk Forum (17th, Assystem)
items.relevance: CPD-accredited one-day forum on "Delivering at pace: accelerating UK nuclear projects through regulatory reform". Relevant to licensing strategy and first-of-a-kind delivery; seek a panel slot rather than sponsorship.

items.name: NEA Workshop on Regulatory Approaches to Non-Electrical Applications
items.relevance: Regulator–industry forum on district heating, process heat and hydrogen — exceptionally close to newcleo's industrial-applications proposition. Hybrid; only 50 in-person seats, registration closes 28 Aug.

items.name: WANO Biennial General Meeting
items.relevance: Operational excellence / safety peer review. Relevant given newcleo team's WANO background.

items.name: WNIC-SMR America 2026 (4th World Nuclear SMR & Advanced Reactor Congress)
items.participation: Speaking, exhibiting, B2B matchmaking with utilities, hyperscalers, investors and regulators (NRC/CNSC/ONR)
items.speaker: Draws senior leaders from TerraPower, Westinghouse, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta and DOE-adjacent stakeholders per organiser materials
items.relevance: Covers FOAK-to-NOAK economics, HALEU full-chain readiness, licensing reform and hyperscaler PPAs — squarely in newcleo's US entry and advanced-reactor commercialisation themes

items.name: International Youth Nuclear Congress 2026 (IYNC)
items.organizer: IYNC with France Youth Generation in Nuclear
items.relevance: Biennial flagship of the international nuclear youth community (Palais des Papes, Avignon — newcleo has a site there). Technical sessions, roundtables and exhibition; strong for employer brand and technical talent. Best suited to a technical/fuel-cycle speaker. Sponsorship decision ~30 Jun.

items.name: IAEA IDOS3 (Medical Radiation Dosimetry)
items.relevance: Medical radiation focus. Not relevant.

items.name: NIA International Group Meeting
items.relevance: Route to UK government, export and international nuclear-market and supply-chain contacts. Pursue bilateral meetings; member/invitation conditions may apply.

items.name: TopFuel 2026
items.organizer: ENS / Atomic Energy Society of Japan (cosponsored ANS, IAEA)
items.relevance: Premier annual LWR fuel-performance conference (rotates Europe/US/Asia). Closed fuel cycles, used fuel re-use, ATF, MOX. Directly relevant to newcleo fuel programme and MOX qualification.

items.name: ENEF — 19th European Nuclear Energy Forum
items.relevance: EC-organised annual forum on nuclear opportunities/risks. Alternates Prague/Bratislava. Key EU policy platform. MONITOR.

items.name: African Energy Week
items.relevance: African energy market.

items.name: IAEA Fuel Supply Chain Conference
items.relevance: Front-end fuel cycle, HALEU, advanced fuels. Directly relevant to MOX and supply chain strategy.

items.name: 26th INLA Nuclear Inter Jura Congress 2026
items.speaker: Khalil Bukhari, Michael, Sarah
items.relevance: Leading global nuclear law congress (biennial, ~600 attendees). "Powering the Nuclear Future: Law, Investment and the Next Generation". Khalil on organising committee. Zangrando sponsoring.

items.name: NEI International Uranium Fuel Seminar
items.relevance: Premier uranium fuel seminar. Critical for MOX/fuel cycle positioning and fuel supply chain networking.

items.name: World Nuclear Supply Chain 2026
items.relevance: WNA commercial supply-chain forum connecting vendors, developers, utilities, EPCs, manufacturers and financiers, with structured B2B/B2G meetings. Strong platform for newcleo's fuel-cycle and reactor supply-chain proposition. Geographically outside core scope but strategically valuable; early-bird to 21 Aug.

items.name: Reuters Events: Energy Transition Europe 2026
items.relevance: Capped at ~250 of Europe's most senior energy leaders, investors and policymakers; nuclear explicitly on the agenda alongside LNG and renewables. European decision-maker access. (Confirm exact dates on registration.)

items.name: Singapore International Energy Week
items.relevance: ASEAN energy policy.

items.name: Nuclear Power Ministerial Conference
items.relevance: Ministerial-level. Policy influence, international partnerships, newcleo visibility at government level.

items.name: IAEA Symposium on International Safeguards
items.relevance: Safeguards innovation. Relevant to Euratom safeguards-by-design and proliferation resistance.

items.name: COP31 — UN Climate Change Conference
items.relevance: Global climate summit. Nuclear has had growing presence (Net Zero Nuclear pledge). Platform for newcleo energy-sovereignty and decarbonisation narrative. World Leaders Summit Nov 11-12.

items.name: Nuclear Security Conference 2026
items.relevance: UK security/safeguards conference — relevant to recycled-fuel, plutonium and public-confidence themes. (Replaces a previously unsubstantiated "Dunblane supply chain" entry; this is what the NIA calendar actually lists on 12 Nov.)

items.name: ANS Winter Conference & Expo 2026
items.speaker: Stefano Buono, Stéphane Calpena, Gabriel Floch, Emanuele Fontani
items.relevance: Embedded topicals: Advanced Reactor Safety, ICAPP, Thermal Hydraulics. Relevant to LFR community.

items.name: ANTS 2026 — Advanced Nuclear Technologies in Space
items.relevance: First European event dedicated to space nuclear technologies. Fast-reactor/advanced-fuel expertise may be tangentially relevant, but space is adjacent to newcleo's commercial strategy — monitor; submit only with a strong technical fit.

items.name: Nuclear 2026 & Annual Dinner
items.relevance: Major UK industry, policy and supply-chain gathering — especially relevant after newcleo's UK GDA entry. Save-the-date published but programme not yet set: a useful early window to request a speaking role on advanced reactors, fuel sustainability or recycled materials in UK energy security.

items.name: Mizuho Power, Energy & Infrastructure Conference
items.speaker: Jon Stranske
items.relevance: Japanese investment bank energy conference. Relevant to nuclear investor outreach and cross-Pacific positioning.

items.name: Reuters Events: Energy LIVE 2026
items.relevance: 1,500+ senior US energy executives. Covers advanced nuclear moving from paper to construction, data-centre co-location and Big Tech energy strategy. High-value US market and partner visibility.

items.name: India Energy Week 2027
items.organizer: Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas / FIPI
items.relevance: Major global energy platform (120+ countries, 540+ speakers); WNA DG speaks and nuclear features. Useful for emerging-market and global visibility. 2027 dates not yet confirmed.

items.name: Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference 2027
items.speaker: Stefano Buono, Elisabeth Rizzotti
items.relevance: Premier Goldman Sachs annual energy conference. Nuclear was dominant theme in 2026 edition. Critical for investor visibility with GS as SPAC advisor.

items.name: Needham & Co. Growth Conference 2027
items.speaker: Potential for virtual
items.relevance: Growth-focused investor conference. Relevant to newcleo Americas investor outreach.

items.name: World Economic Forum Annual Meeting 2027 (Davos)
items.relevance: Premier global leaders' forum; nuclear is now a recurring energy-security theme and WNA leadership attends with high-profile panels. Top-tier policy/finance networking — speaking access is limited but visibility is high.

items.name: USNIC Advanced Reactor Summit 2027
items.relevance: US Nuclear Industry Council's advanced-reactor developer summit — a core gathering of the US advanced-reactor circuit (TerraPower, X-energy and peers) on deployment, supply chain and financing. Useful for US market positioning. 2027 dates TBC (2026 was 10-12 Feb, Seattle).

items.name: World Energy Congress
items.organizer: World Energy Council & Saudi Ministry of Energy
items.relevance: 27th edition (biennial), 'Inspiring Transformations, Delivering Transitions'. Premier whole-ecosystem energy congress; nuclear featured and WNA leadership attends. Corrected from a prior 2026 listing — no WEC is held in 2026.

items.name: Generation IV International Forum (GIF) — symposia & "GIF Talks with Industry"
items.relevance: International R&D forum for Gen IV systems incl. lead-cooled fast reactors (14 members + Euratom). Runs periodic symposia plus the ongoing "GIF Talks with Industry" webinar series, where Blykalla presented on lead-cooled SMR materials and uranium-nitride fuel. Directly aligned with newcleo's LFR technology — a venue to engage on Gen IV positioning. Webinars ongoing; next in-person symposium date TBC.

items.name: South Carolina Nuclear Summit (3rd Annual)
items.organizer: Palmetto Nuclear Coalition, University of South Carolina Molinaroli College of Engineering & Computing, with Santee Cooper
items.dates: TBC (2nd edition held 9 Dec 2025; annual cadence suggests Dec 2026)
items.participation: Potential panel/speaking on advanced reactor deployment and fuel-cycle policy; networking with SC state leadership, NRC, Santee Cooper, Brookfield/Westinghouse
items.speaker: Past editions featured NRC Chairman, SC Governor, Santee Cooper CEO, Brookfield/Westinghouse executives, NEI
items.relevance: South Carolina/Savannah River is newcleo's priority US geography for surplus-plutonium/MOX work; this summit is the state's flagship nuclear-policy and investment convening venue

items.name: PIME 2026 — Nuclear Communications Conference (TBC)
items.relevance: ENS nuclear communications conference for comms/PA professionals. Revived in 2024. MONITOR.

items.name: Nordic Nuclear Forum 2027
items.relevance: Annual Nordic nuclear gathering. The 2026 edition featured Blykalla and was opened by WNA DG Sama Bilbao y León, focused on European SMR/LFR deployment, supply chains and energy sovereignty. Strong European LFR-peer and policy visibility. 2027 dates not yet announced.
